# Ruby Binding — modern-colorthief-ruby

```ruby
require 'modern_colorthief'

palette = ModernColorthief.get_palette(pixels, width, height, color_count, quality)
color = ModernColorthief.get_color(pixels, width, height, quality)
```

## Parameters

- `pixels`: `String` (raw bytes) — RGBA pixel data (4 bytes per pixel)
- `width`: `Integer` — image width
- `height`: `Integer` — image height
- `color_count`: `Integer` — colors to extract (default: 10)
- `quality`: `Integer` — sampling quality 1-10 (default: 10)

## Image Decoding

Use `image_processing` gem (MiniMagick or VIPS) for decoding.
